deck:
* CLLC Bidirectional Resonant Converter - Generated by OpenMagnetics
* Vin=7.500000e+02V, Vout=6.000000e+02V, Pout=1.099800e+04W, fs=7.300000e+01kHz, fr=7.300000e+01kHz
* n=1.250000e+00, L1=2.711550e+01uH, C1=1.752980e+02nF
* Lm=1.206640e+02uH, L2=1.735392e+01uH, C2=2.739031e+02nF

* DC Input
Vin vin_p 0 7.500000e+02

* Switch model (CLLC_REWRITE_PLAN §6.2)
.model SW1 SW(VT=2.500000e+00 VH=8.000000e-01 RON=1.000000e-02 ROFF=1.000000e+06)
.model DBODY D(IS=1e-12 N=1 RS=0.001 BV=2000)

* PWM control signals (complementary pairs with dead time)
Vpwm1 pwm1 0 PULSE(0 5.000000e+00 0 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 6.549315e-06 1.369863e-05)
Vpwm2 pwm2 0 PULSE(0 5.000000e+00 6.849315e-06 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 6.549315e-06 1.369863e-05)

* Primary Full Bridge (4 active switches)
Vq1_sense vin_p qa_drain 0
Vq3_sense vin_p qc_drain 0
S1 qa_drain node_a pwm1 0 SW1
S2 node_a 0     pwm2 0 SW1
S3 qc_drain node_b pwm2 0 SW1
S4 node_b 0     pwm1 0 SW1
* Primary body diodes (antiparallel across each switch)
DS1 node_a vin_p DBODY
DS2 0      node_a DBODY
DS3 node_b vin_p DBODY
DS4 0      node_b DBODY
* Primary snubbers (1k + 1nF across each switch)
Rsn_S1 vin_p ns1 1000
   Csn_S1 ns1 node_a 1.000000e-09
Rsn_S2 node_a ns2 1000
  Csn_S2 ns2 0 1.000000e-09
Rsn_S3 vin_p ns3 1000
   Csn_S3 ns3 node_b 1.000000e-09
Rsn_S4 node_b ns4 1000
  Csn_S4 ns4 0 1.000000e-09

* Bridge differential voltage probe
Evab vab 0 VALUE={V(node_a) - V(node_b)}

* Primary current sense
Vpri_sense node_a pri_c1_in 0

* Primary Resonant Tank (Cr1 series with Lr1)
C_res1 pri_c1_in pri_l1_in 1.752980e-07
L_res1 pri_l1_in pri_trafo_in 2.711550e-05

* Transformer (coupled inductors, K=0.9999 — never 1.0)
Lpri pri_trafo_in node_b 1.206640e-04
Lsec sec_trafo_p sec_trafo_n 7.722494e-05
Kpri_sec Lpri Lsec 0.9999

* Secondary Resonant Tank (Lr2 series with Cr2) + sense
Vsec_sense sec_trafo_p sec_l2_in 0
L_res2 sec_l2_in sec_c2_in 1.735392e-05
C_res2 sec_c2_in node_c 2.739031e-07

* Secondary bridge reference node
Vd_ref sec_trafo_n node_d 0
Rdc_sec sec_trafo_n 0 1G

* Differential winding-voltage probes (§8a.5)
Evpri_w vpri_w 0 pri_trafo_in node_b 1
Evsec_w vsec_w 0 sec_trafo_p sec_trafo_n 1

* Secondary Active Synchronous Rectifier (4 SR switches)
* pwm1 -> Sa, Sd    pwm2 -> Sb, Sc   (forward mode SR)
Sa node_c vout_p pwm1 0 SW1
Sb vout_n node_c pwm2 0 SW1
Sc node_d vout_p pwm2 0 SW1
Sd vout_n node_d pwm1 0 SW1
* Secondary snubbers (1k + 1nF across each SR switch)
Rsn_Sa node_c nsa 1000
  Csn_Sa nsa vout_p 1.000000e-09
Rsn_Sb vout_n nsb 1000
  Csn_Sb nsb node_c 1.000000e-09
Rsn_Sc node_d nsc 1000
  Csn_Sc nsc vout_p 1.000000e-09
Rsn_Sd vout_n nsd 1000
  Csn_Sd nsd node_d 1.000000e-09

* Secondary ground reference
Vgnd_sec vout_n 0 0

* Output filter, current sense, and load
Cout vout_p vout_n 10u IC=6.000000e+02
Vout_sense vout_p vout_load 0
Rload vout_load vout_n 32.733224

* Transient Analysis (UIC honors .ic pre-charge)
.tran 6.849315e-08 2.741096e-02 2.739726e-02 UIC

* Save signals
.save v(vab) v(vin_p) v(pri_trafo_in) v(node_a) v(node_b)
+ v(node_c) v(node_d) v(sec_trafo_p) v(sec_trafo_n)
+ v(vout_p) v(vout_n) v(pri_c1_in) v(sec_c2_in)
+ v(vpri_w) v(vsec_w)
+ i(Vin) i(Vpri_sense) i(Vsec_sense) i(Vout_sense)
+ i(Vq1_sense) i(Vq3_sense)

* Solver options (CLLC_REWRITE_PLAN §6.2)
.options RELTOL=1.000000e-02 ABSTOL=1.000000e-07 VNTOL=1.000000e-04 ITL1=500 ITL4=500
.options METHOD=GEAR TRTOL=7.000000e+00

* Initial conditions (UIC pre-charge)
.ic v(vout_p)=600.000000
.ic v(pri_l1_in)=0 v(sec_c2_in)=0

.end
